Why us

Why AirMax

Evaporative cooling technology — energy-efficient and built for Hong Kong.

Real cooling power

Drop temperatures by up to 10°C at a fraction of the cost of air conditioning.

Air purification

Select models include ion plasma and UV-C sterilisation for better indoor air quality.

Smart control

Tuya WiFi app lets you adjust settings from anywhere.

Quiet operation

Low-noise design suitable for offices and homes.

Wide coverage

Models from 300 to 1,200+ sqft — pick the right size for your space.

Energy efficient

No refrigerant. Up to 80% less electricity than traditional air conditioning.

How evaporative cooling works

Evaporative coolers work by drawing warm air through a wet cooling pad. As the water evaporates, it absorbs heat — dropping air temperature by up to 10°C while adding moisture. Uses up to 80% less electricity than air conditioning. Works best in semi-open or well-ventilated spaces.

AirMax Air conditioning

Refrigerant None Required

Installation Plug and play Professional required
